name: Chestnut Fool
recipeInstructions:
1. Sieve the boiled and peeled chestnuts into a bowl.
2. Add the cocoa, sugar, butter, and 100 grams whipped cream to the bowl.
3. Blend well until smooth.
4. Pour the mixture into individual glasses and place them in the fridge.
5. Whip the remaining fresh cream and keep it cool.
6. Using a suitable icing bag or piping attachment, cover the chestnut puree in the glasses with the whipped cream just before serving.
WARNING: Ensure all steps are completed before placing the glasses in the fridge to prevent any potential safety hazards from hot ingredients coming into contact with cold surfaces.
